privileged_info_summary: Verified that the task operates on a synthetically generated operations brief for ArduPilot parameter configuration. The expected values for TERRAIN_ENABLE (1), RTL_ALT (20000), RTL_CLIMB_MIN (5000), RTL_SPEED (800), RTL_ALT_FINAL (1000), and FS_GCS_ENABLE (1) explicitly match the generated instructions in the ops brief and the verification logic in verifier.py.
